title: cyclosorus kuliangensis
intro: Cyclosorus kuliangensis, also known as the Kuliang fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Cyclosorus kuliangensis include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
